task_name: Add per-agent model config to `context-budgets.json` — add `model` field per agent (e.g., `"coder": {"model": "claude-sonnet-4-6", ...}`, `"critic": {"model": "claude-opus-4-6", ...}`). `ralph-loop.sh` reads model field for detected agent, passes to `ralph_agent.py --model`. Falls back to `CLAUDE_MODEL` env var if not set
